userId.description: User email address or 'me'. Defaults to 'me'.

q.description: Gmail search query to filter drafts. Supports the same operators as list_messages: 'subject:keyword', 'to:user@example.com', etc.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of drafts to return. Defaults to 20. Use pageToken from the response for the next page.

pageToken.description: Page token from a previous list_drafts response. Pass this to retrieve the next page.

includeSpamTrash.description: Include drafts from SPAM and TRASH in results. Defaults to false.
